turn.speaker: 架构师
turn.content: 我们来设计一个图像处理系统的整体架构。首先从用户交互层开始，用户需要有一个明确的入口来上传和处理图片。

metadata.alignment_note: Architect opens discussion on user interaction layer, directly introducing stage 1's scope (Client, user browser, upload interface).

turn.speaker: 开发者
turn.content: 明白，那我们就先定义客户端部分。我建议用一个「Client」组来包含所有前端相关的组件，确保结构清晰。

metadata.alignment_note: Developer proposes 'Client' group, which maps to delta_op add_group with group_id='group_1'.

planner.notes: Added Client group for frontend components as per dialogue.

turn.speaker: 架构师
turn.content: 很好，在这个客户端组下面，我们可以再细分一个「Next.js Web App」前端框架组。然后用户浏览器作为发起请求的节点，加上上传界面和表单组件。

metadata.alignment_note: Architect elaborates Client structure with Next.js Web App, User Browser, and Upload UI — all stage 1 elements.

turn.speaker: 开发者
turn.content: 好的，用户通过浏览器访问我们的Next.js应用，然后使用上传UI和表单来提交图片。这样前端层就搭建完成了。

metadata.alignment_note: Developer confirms frontend layer completion — marks clean transition from stage 1.

gate.reason: turn 4 reached end boundary for stage 2

planner.notes: Added Next.js Web App group and Browser, UploadUI, Form nodes inside Client.

update.preview_mermaid:
graph TD
    Browser["Browser"]
    UploadUI["Upload UI"]
    Form["Form"]

state_after.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Browser["Browser"]
    UploadUI["Upload UI"]
    Form["Form"]

turn.speaker: 架构师
turn.content: 现在前端基础已经就位，接下来需要考虑后端服务了。用户上传的数据需要一个服务器端来接收和处理。

metadata.alignment_note: Architect introduces 'backend service' concept, transitioning to stage 2 expansion.

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Browser["Browser"]
    UploadUI["Upload UI"]
    Form["Form"]

turn.speaker: 开发者
turn.content: 那我们来添加一个「API Service」后端服务组吧，这样前端和后端的职责就分开了。

metadata.alignment_note: Developer adds 'API Service' group, matching delta_op add_group with group_id='Backend'.

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Browser["Browser"]
    UploadUI["Upload UI"]
    Form["Form"]

turn.speaker: 架构师
turn.content: 没错，在这个API服务组里，我们添加一个REST API节点，它负责接收前端发来的请求，并协调后续的处理流程。

metadata.alignment_note: Architect defines REST API node inside API Service, matching delta_op add_node for 'API'.

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Browser["Browser"]
    UploadUI["Upload UI"]
    Form["Form"]

turn.speaker: 开发者
turn.content: 这样前端的上传UI就能通过API与后端通信了。接下来需要考虑后端内部的数据存储和处理能力。

metadata.alignment_note: Developer confirms frontend-backend communication pipeline, wrapping up stage 2.

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Browser["Browser"]
    UploadUI["Upload UI"]
    Form["Form"]

turn.speaker: 架构师
turn.content: 现在我们需要完善后端的存储和处理能力。用户上传的原始图片需要先存储起来，然后经过一系列处理步骤。

metadata.alignment_note: Architect transitions to storage and internal processing, introducing stage 3 scope.

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Browser["Browser"]
    UploadUI["Upload UI"]
    Form["Form"]

planner.notes: Added API Service group with REST API and Image Storage nodes for backend processing.

update.preview_mermaid:
graph TD
    Browser["Browser"]
    UploadUI["Upload UI"]
    Form["Form"]
    REST API["REST API"]
    Image Storage["Image Storage"]

state_after.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Browser["Browser"]
    UploadUI["Upload UI"]
    Form["Form"]
    REST API["REST API"]
    Image Storage["Image Storage"]

turn.speaker: 开发者
turn.content: 我来添加一个「Storage」存储组，用来存放用户上传的原始文件。原始图片应该作为后续所有处理的输入源。

metadata.alignment_note: Developer adds 'Storage' group, matching delta_op add_group with group_id='group_4' and introduces '(Originals)' node.

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Browser["Browser"]
    UploadUI["Upload UI"]
    Form["Form"]
    REST API["REST API"]
    Image Storage["Image Storage"]

turn.speaker: 架构师
turn.content: 很好，有了存储之后，我们需要定义处理流程。我建议用一个「Processing Pipeline」处理流水线节点来涵盖所有图像处理步骤。

metadata.alignment_note: Architect proposes 'Processing Pipeline' node, directly mapping to PIPE delta_op.

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Browser["Browser"]
    UploadUI["Upload UI"]
    Form["Form"]
    REST API["REST API"]
    Image Storage["Image Storage"]

turn.speaker: 开发者
turn.content: 这个流水线应该包含哪些处理阶段呢？图像处理通常包括验证、分割、特征检测等多个环节。

metadata.alignment_note: Developer queries processing stages, prompting Architect's detailed pipeline explanation.

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Browser["Browser"]
    UploadUI["Upload UI"]
    Form["Form"]
    REST API["REST API"]
    Image Storage["Image Storage"]

turn.speaker: 架构师
turn.content: 完整的流水线应该包括：验证输入有效性、图像分割与抠图、人脸检测与裁剪、尺寸调整与增强，以及最后的背景合成。这样用户就能得到专业处理过的照片。

metadata.alignment_note: Architect enumerates complete pipeline steps, fully populating Processing Pipeline label. Stage 3 complete.

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Browser["Browser"]
    UploadUI["Upload UI"]
    Form["Form"]
    REST API["REST API"]
    Image Storage["Image Storage"]

turn.speaker: 开发者
turn.content: 现在存储和处理都有了，最后一步就是定义处理结果的输出格式了。用户需要知道处理后的图片是什么格式。

metadata.alignment_note: Developer raises output format question, transitioning to final stage.

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Browser["Browser"]
    UploadUI["Upload UI"]
    Form["Form"]
    REST API["REST API"]
    Image Storage["Image Storage"]

planner.notes: Added Storage group with Raw Images, Processing Pipeline with sub-steps, and Output Format node.

turn.speaker: 架构师
turn.content: 最终输出应该支持两种常见格式：PNG和JPG，这样用户可以根据使用场景灵活选择。我们来添加一个输出节点来表示最终交付的内容。

metadata.alignment_note: Architect specifies PNG/JPG output formats, matching delta_op add_node for 'OUT'.

turn.speaker: 开发者
turn.content: 太好了，这样整个架构就完整了：从用户在浏览器端通过Next.js应用上传图片，到REST API接收请求，存储原始文件，通过完整的处理流水线进行多阶段处理，最后以PNG或JPG格式输出结果。

metadata.alignment_note: Developer summarizes complete architecture flow, validating stage 4 completion.
